description: Send control commands from the platform to GPS tracking hardware using the device's native protocol channel or SMS fallback, supporting engine control, configuration, alarm management, and information requests.

actors.name: Fleet Operator
actors.description: Initiates commands to devices through the platform interface

actors.name: Tracking Platform
actors.description: Validates, routes, and delivers commands to devices; queues when device is offline

actors.name: GPS Device
actors.description: Receives and executes commands, acknowledges via subsequent position or dedicated response

fields.name: type
fields.description: Command type identifier. Common types: engine_stop, engine_resume, reboot_device, power_off, factory_reset, position_single, position_periodic, position_stop, alarm_arm, alarm_disarm, alarm_dismiss, set_timezone, set_odometer, set_connection, set_speed_limit, send_sms, send_ussd, message, voice_message, request_photo, voice_monitoring, get_version, get_modem_status, get_device_status, identification, firmware_update, custom

fields.name: text_channel
fields.description: When true, command is sent via SMS rather than the data channel; requires device phone number

fields.name: description
fields.description: Human-readable label for this saved command

fields.name: attributes
fields.description: Command-specific parameters. Common keys: frequency (reporting interval in seconds), timezone, device_password, radius, message_text, enable (boolean toggle), data (raw bytes for custom commands), phone_number, server_host, server_port

access.permission_required: Commands can only be sent to devices the requesting user has permission to manage
access.limit_commands_restriction: Users with the limitCommands restriction cannot send commands

validation.protocol_support_check: The platform checks whether the device's current protocol supports the requested command type; unsupported commands are rejected before delivery
validation.text_channel_requires_phone: Commands sent via the text channel require the device to have a phone number configured

processing.offline_queuing: When a device is offline (no active TCP connection) and text_channel is false, the command is queued and delivered when the device next connects
processing.custom_commands_always_accepted: Custom commands (type = custom) are always accepted regardless of protocol capability declarations
processing.engine_control_confirmation: engine_stop and engine_resume require extra authorisation and must be confirmed before execution
processing.saved_commands: Saved commands (stored with description) can be recalled and re-sent without re-entering parameters

given: fleet_operator selects command type and target device
user has permission to manage the device
user does not have limitCommands restriction
device protocol supports the command type or type is custom
device is online on the data channel or text_channel is true
command_sent.result: Command is dispatched to the device and acknowledged or executed asynchronously

given: user has permission and command type is supported
command_queued.result: Command stored in queue; delivered automatically when device reconnects

given: device protocol does not support the requested command type
unsupported_command.result: Command is rejected; operator is informed that the device does not support this command

any: user does not have access to the target device

permission_denied.result: Command is rejected; no information about the device is disclosed

errors.message: The target device does not support this command type
You do not have permission to send commands to this device
The specified device does not exist

events.name: command.sent
events.description: A command was dispatched to a device

events.name: command.queued
events.description: A command was queued for offline delivery

events.name: command.delivered
events.description: A queued command was delivered upon device reconnection

related.description: Devices must be registered to receive commands
Permission model controls who can send commands
